home.heroSubtitle: Upload buy/sell slips from Bitkub, Binance TH, and Binance. Our AI reads each slip and tracks your Bitcoin stack, cost basis, and P&L — all in one place.
home.feature1Desc: Log a BTC buy or sell in seconds — the live BTC price is pre-filled and editable, and entering a total auto-calculates the amount. You can also attach a slip image (JPG, PNG, WebP) to keep as a record.
home.feature2Desc: Track your stack in THB or USD: current value, average cost, unrealized and realized P&L, allocation, and the live BTC price — refreshable anytime.
home.feature3Desc: See every buy and sell plotted on an interactive price chart. Filter by exchange and date to see exactly when you stacked.
home.feature4Desc: Share your stack with a private link — via LINE, X, Facebook or QR code. Flip on Privacy Mode to reveal only your % return and stacker badges, choose what's visible, and set link expiry.
home.feature5Desc: Subscribe with Bitcoin over the Lightning Network via BTCPay Server — instant, low-fee payments.
home.feature6Desc: Log BTC trades from Bitkub, Binance TH, and Binance International — all unified into a single stack.
home.ctaSubtitle: Join Thai Bitcoiners who track their stack with StackSats.

upload.title: Stack Bitcoin
upload.subtitle: Record your Bitcoin (BTC) buy/sell transactions to track your stack.
upload.dropzone: Drag & drop or click to browse
upload.analyzingDesc: Claude Vision is extracting transaction details
upload.manualFill: Could not read slip automatically. Please fill in manually.
upload.successDesc: Your slip has been processed and added to your portfolio.
upload.supportedDesc: Bitkub, Binance TH (Thailand), and Binance International. Supports JPG, PNG, WebP and PDF files up to 10MB. AI will read and pre-fill the form — you can edit before saving.
upload.tipClearImageDesc: Take a clear, well-lit photo of the slip without shadows or blur
upload.tipFullSlipDesc: Capture the entire slip including exchange logo and all transaction details
upload.tipReviewCarefullyDesc: Always verify AI-extracted data before confirming, especially amounts

chart.title: Buy/Sell Chart
chart.subtitle: Visualize your trades on the price timeline
chart.noData: No transactions found for the selected filters

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.subtitle: Manage your plan
subscription.paymentReceivedDesc: Your subscription will be activated within a few minutes.
subscription.freeDesc1: You are on the free plan with limited features.
subscription.freeDesc2: Free: up to 50 transactions/month · Paid: unlimited + all features
subscription.methodDesc: Pay with Wallet of Satoshi (or any Lightning wallet). After you pay, an admin verifies the memo and activates your plan.
subscription.memoHelp: Put this reference in the payment memo so we can match your payment.
subscription.pendingReview: After paying, your plan is activated once an admin approves (usually within minutes).
subscription.pendingBanner: You have a pending payment awaiting approval
subscription.notConfigured: Payment is not available yet. Please try again later.
subscription.invoiceReady: Invoice includes the amount & memo — just scan and confirm.
subscription.invoiceFallback: Scan to pay, then enter the amount & memo below manually.
